covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly covid surveillance data from Illinois Department of Public Health
covid_surveillance.long_description: Illinois Department of Public Health collects and reports covid surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

il_dph.name: Illinois Department of Public Health
il_dph.description: Illinois Department of Public Health provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for Illinois covering pathogens including: covid, influenza, rsv, ari, adenovirus, enterovirus, metapneumovirus, mycoplasma, parainfluenza, pneumonia . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
il_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
